title: rubus subalbicans
intro: Rubus subalbicans is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of phenolic compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rubus subalbicans are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
